summary: Session 8E Fix Verification - All 4 fixes verified as working plus 4 regressions from 8C. Vehicles page shows EVs with ACTIVE status, AMC Management shows ₹217,663 revenue with subscriptions table, Credit Notes shows 5 CNs with ISSUED/APPLIED badges, HR Dashboard shows ₹40,000 salary (not ₹NaN).

issues: 404 console errors for some resources (cosmetic, does not affect functionality)

Fix_1_Vehicles.details: Page loads without crash. Shows Ather 450X, Ola S1 Pro, TVS iQube, Mahindra Treo Zor, Tata Nexon EV, MG ZS EV, Hero Vida V1, Hyundai Ioniq 5 with ACTIVE status badges and status dropdown

Fix_2_AMC_Management.details: Page loads without crash. Subscriptions table shows Customer/Vehicle No./Plan/Category/Billing/Start Date/End Date/Usage/Status/Actions columns. Total Revenue ₹217,663 with 8 active subscriptions displayed

Fix_3_Credit_Notes.details: Page loads with data. 5 credit notes visible: Delhi Motors Pvt Ltd (₹5,900 ISSUED), Sunita Patel (₹3,604.49 APPLIED), Arjun Mehta (₹2,812.2 APPLIED), Neha Joshi (₹3,691.93 APPLIED), Deepak Gupta (₹2,710.45 APPLIED)

Fix_4_HR_Salary.details: Payroll Status table shows ₹40,000 per employee correctly (no ₹NaN). 25 Total Employees listed, all showing PENDING payroll status

Regression_4_Chart_of_Accounts.details: Page loads with account types (Assets, Liabilities, Equity, Income, Expense)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 8E - All 4 fixes verified working. Fix 1: Vehicles page uses (vehicle.status || vehicle.current_status) fallback for status. Fix 2: AMC Management extracts subsData.data from response. Fix 3: Credit Notes fetches from /credit-notes/, /contacts-enhanced/, /invoices-enhanced/ instead of /zoho/ dead endpoints. Fix 4: HR Dashboard computes salary as basic+hra+da when salary is an object. All 4 regressions from 8C still working (payments-received, inventory-adjustments, accounting, chart-of-accounts).
